title: Reduce intraday notes and personality context bloat for proposal executor sessions
summary: Proposal executor sessions were hitting 201k token limits due to accumulated intraday notes + full SOUL.md being injected repeatedly over 10 hours. Add aggressive capping for proposal executor session context: skip SOUL.md, cap intraday to 3 recent entries only, and use lighter personality context for background_task mode when sessionId indicates proposal execution.

affectedFiles.description: Add lightweight context path for proposal executor sessions: skip SOUL.md, cap intraday notes to 3 entries.
